front.title: A wooden mask
front.description:
Carved from pale elder wood in the shape of a bird’s head, but with small horns and fangs. The inside is chiseled with glyphs like those that the Forest Folk used to make.

**Something interesting:** You recognize glyphs for “beast,” “spirit,” “forest,” and… “peace?” Or maybe “treaty.”

*An artifact of the wider world — see @UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.GaDYK1VEJEi6tHDa]{Forest Folk}.*

back.title: A wooden mask
back.description:
**Something useful:** When you **_wear the_** **_wooden mask_**, beasts of the Great Wood will do you no harm, though your companions have no such protection. Perversions of nature are unaffected. If you **_harm a beast of_** **_the Great Wood while wearing the mask_**, it loses all power and rapidly rots away.

*An artifact of the wider world — see @UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.GaDYK1VEJEi6tHDa]{Forest Folk}.*
